doctrine.principle: Doug interacts with Captain-rank abstractions and above only.

memory.name: Captain Memory

email.name: Captain Emily
email.role: Email drafting, inbox review, and message handling

care.name: Captain Emme
care.role: Emotional support, grounding, Shine Care, and nervous-system guidance
